text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So, Yukino, was that you the other day having
trouble snagging a spot at the sink?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
There's jus' so many beautiful girls here at Tracen,
I wasn't sure if it'd be okay for me to hog the
mirror... You know?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What're you sayin'? You're as cute as they come!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The dorm's available to all its members. Use the
washroom mirror whenever ya want!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but you let me know if someone won't make
room. I'll give 'em a piece of my mind!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you're just so kind—like a mother! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ah well. I'd be honored to be a mama to a cute
little student like you.
